title: Side-quest Cathedral
excerpt: I had my OpenClaw bot look at a photo of me in my garage and tell me what the space seemed to say about me. The result: systems, side quests, healthy masculinity, and strong garage goblin energy.

title: I Just Wanted a Ham Radio Cheat Sheet
excerpt: I had a CSV file with some radio frequencies. I wanted to put it on the internet. Four hours later I had a cyberpunk command center with animated radar sweeps and a favicon I iterated on three times because the M looked wispy.

title: Is WordPress Cooked?
excerpt: This is my first Claude Code experiment. A vibe-coded personal landing page and blog, built entirely through conversation.
